title: MCA (Specialization in Computer Network & Cyber Security)
content: The Master of Computer Applications (M.C.A.) – Industry Oriented Specialization in Computer Network & Cyber Security is a specialized postgraduate program designed to equip students with advanced knowledge and practical expertise in network management, cybersecurity, and ethical hacking. The curriculum integrates core computer science principles with specialized topics such as network security, cryptography, penetration testing, cloud security, and digital forensics. Emphasizing industry relevance, the program includes hands-on training, real-world case studies, and collaborations with cybersecurity experts and organizations. Students gain proficiency in securing IT infrastructures, mitigating cyber threats, and implementing robust security frameworks for enterprises. With a strong focus on research, compliance, and emerging technologies, this program prepares graduates for careers as cybersecurity analysts, network administrators, ethical hackers, security consultants, and IT security managers in leading organizations across various industries. Students having CUET Score will be given preference in merit 01 02 03 04 05 06 07 08 Project management and finance: Demonstrate knowledge and understanding of t h e c o m p u t i n g and management principles and apply these to one’s own work, as a member and leader in a team, to manage projects and in multidisciplinary environments. 09 10 11 12 01 Be able to successfully pursue doctoral research in Computer Application and allied disciplines at institutions of transnational reputation. 02 Serve in technical or managerial roles at Government firms, Corporates and contributing to the society as successful entrepreneurs through startup 03 Be engaged with leading Global Software services companies, Consultancy organizations and academic Institutions 01 02 Students having CUET Score will be given preference in merit
